title: [v5.3] Some backports for 5.3
body:
Backports of
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24473
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24479
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24485
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24447

We will need the new CI images for the vendor part. This is also not the final vendor but at least we will know that the recent main vendor passes CI on the 5.3 branch.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note

```
